message.content:
This bibliography section (references 26–50) functions as a source index for industry research and can answer retrieval questions across the following dimensions:

- **Topics:** Influencer marketing in gaming, cross-platform game development, game subscription models, self-publishing vs. traditional publishing, indie game development costs, esports viewership and sponsorship, brand collaborations/partnerships, and gaming console market trends.
- **Entities & Sources:** Industry publications and platforms including Games Industry.biz, Gamalytic, Wired, GRYNOW, TapNation, Sportspro, Simon-Kucher, Venture Beat, BBC, LinkedIn, Market.us, 80.lv, Kofluence, Konvoy, Lyncconf, Juego Studio, Game Developer, Main Leaf, Moldstud, and Socially Powerful. Specific companies/games cited: Remedy, League of Legends, Palworld, Helldivers 2.
- **Dates & Timeframes:** Source publication dates span October 2020 to January 2025, with a heavy concentration in 2024.
- **Definitions & Concepts:** Subscription models in gaming, distinctions between mobile game developers and publishers, cross-platform development frameworks, and the self-publishing business model.
- **Claims & Findings:** Self-publishing enables more commercial strategic thinking (Remedy); the gaming industry is increasingly targeting subscription-based revenue; influencer marketing is a critical growth driver for gaming brands; cross-platform development is gaining market popularity; and the 2024 League of Legends World Championship set a new all-time viewership record.
- **Metrics & Data Points:** Reported gross revenue for Palworld (~$500M) and Helldivers 2 (>$200M); average viewership for the 2024 LoL World Championship (~1.73M); 2025 indie game development cost estimates; gaming console performance/quality statistics; and lists of major esports sponsors.
- **Procedures & Guides:** Strategies for building developer/publisher partnerships, technical/business requirements for cross-platform development, and execution frameworks for influencer marketing campaigns.
- **Evidence Types:** Market research reports, industry news articles, analytics platform data, developer/publisher case studies, glossary definitions, and campaign performance analyses. (No tables or figures are present in this text window.)

   - **Claims/Findings:** Remedy claims self-publishing helps commercial thinking; Palworld made ~$500M, Helldivers 2 surpassed $200M gross; 2024 LoL World Championship is the most-watched esports tournament ever; gaming industry is shifting toward subscriptions; influencer marketing is critical for gaming companies.

- **Definitions & Concepts:** Subscription models in gaming, distinctions between mobile game developers and publishers, cross-platform development frameworks, and the self-publishing business model.
- **Claims & Findings:** Self-publishing enables more commercial strategic thinking (Remedy); the gaming industry is increasingly targeting subscription-based revenue; influencer marketing is a critical growth driver for gaming brands; cross-platform development is gaining market popularity; and the 2024 League of Legends World Championship set a new all-time viewership record.
- **Metrics & Data Points:** Reported gross revenue for Palworld (~$500M) and Helldivers 2 (>$200M); average viewership for the 2024 LoL World Championship (~1.73M); 2025 indie game development cost estimates; gaming console performance/quality statistics; and lists of major esports sponsors.
- **Procedures & Guides:** Strategies for building developer/publisher partnerships, technical/business requirements for cross-platform development, and execution frameworks for influencer marketing campaigns.
- **Evidence Types:** Market research reports, industry news articles, analytics platform data, developer/publisher case studies, glossary definitions, and campaign performance analyses. (No tables or figures are present in this text window.)
